ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the league was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team is in */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs, championship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game is in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular, playoff, championship) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistics are for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistics are for */,
  "GP" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "ints" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "TD_passes" INTEGER /* Number of touchdown passes */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Number of points */,
  "rec_TD" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "yards_rushing" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "yards_passing" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistics are for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistics are for */,
  "GP" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "ints" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "TD_passes" INTEGER /* Number of touchdown passes */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Number of points */,
  "rec_TD" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "yards_rushing" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "yards_passing" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, analyst, fan) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., game stats, player profile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game highlight */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the highlight is from */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the highlight */,
  "highlight_type" TEXT /* Type of highlight (e.g., touchdown, interception) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the highlight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_highlights_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_highlights_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the profile is for */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  "career_stats" TEXT /* Career statistics for the player */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards and accolades received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's standings */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the standings are for */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the standings are for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
